hooks.command: $changes = git -C 'C:/hex_edit_project' status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($changes) { $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git -C 'C:/hex_edit_project' add -A; git -C 'C:/hex_edit_project' commit -m "Auto: translation update $ts"; git -C 'C:/hex_edit_project' push }
